name: April's ticklish interrogation
description:
Can you make April talk?

This had to happen eventually.

April O’Neil is often said to be the origin point for many tickling / foot fetishes, because of that one scene in the 1980s Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles cartoon where she gets tickle-tortured by a character called Don Turtelli, known primarily for - you guessed it - tickle-torturing people. In this scenario, you can pretend to be his nephew, niece, or son / daughter. Maybe you want to be an associate, or not affiliated at all? Up to you! You're some sort of criminal, having captured April to find out what she knows. The scenario is open-ended and anyPOV, so go nuts.

🥳 Happy New Year! 🎆

🪶 August 27th 2025 - Changed her display pic. Old one is here,

🪶 December 7th 2025 - Changed her display pic again, glowed it up a little!
creator: pixMystical
